content: @fitzgen (he/him) I can't quite find documentation on this, but I think we need to invert our structure, specifically I think child team members are considered members of parent teams meaning that the everyone can get assigned to any review right now b/c the top-level team is the default reviewers
Could you reorganize it with a top-level no-member team where child teams are the ones with members?
and then we'll never assign the top-level team to anything
that means there can only be one leaf team (the root) tho? which means that this just won't work for us
oh I'm thinking that all teams that are assigned are leaf teams
the parent team just has no members and isn't assigned
or, well, the parent team has "all the members" through the child teams
